name: Return to work too soon after comp injury in Idaho, what now?
description: Get doctor note, notify for restarted benefits.[2]

mainEntity.name: Return to work too soon after comp injury in Idaho, what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Get doctor note, notify for restarted benefits.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Inform employer/doctor if worsening; may restart temp disability benefits.[2] Ignoring orders hurts claim.[2] Key factors: follow restrictions exactly; written proof; insurer monitors.[2] See doctor immediately, get updated notes, lawyer prevents benefit loss.[3] Protects long-term payout.
